'''Steltout''' was one of the four continents of [[Essowyn]]. It was located in the north-eastern hemisphere. The other three continents were [[Baslar]], [[Sorontill]], and [[Macor]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]'' {{1stm}}
